{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = High Council of the Advocates
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[High Council of the Advocates]] is a governing body that meets around a silver table.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[High Council]] of [[Advocates]] is a governing body within the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c13">''The Engineer'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
